Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Information We Collect

We collect minimal information:

  • Website analytics (via Google Analytics)
  • Affiliate click tracking (to improve recommendations)

How We Use Information

We use this data to:

  • Improve our content and recommendations
  • Understand which reviews are most helpful

Third-Party Services

  • Google Analytics - analytics
  • Amazon Associates - affiliate links
  • Vercel - website hosting

Contact

Questions about privacy? Contact us at privacy@petfoodlab.it.com

© 2026 PetFoodLab. All rights reserved.

We independently review pet food products. When you buy through our links, we may earn a commission.
